Customers are saying

Customers recognize the 11-inch iPad A16 chip with Wi-Fi - 128GB for its overall performance, stunning screen quality, and portability. Users appreciate the amazing battery life and fast processor speed, as well as the appealing color and perfect size. Some customers noted the lack of cellular connectivity and mentioned concerns regarding price and customer service.

    Excellent Upgrade - Perfect for Everyday Use!

    |
    |
    Posted 5 months ago. Owned for 2 weeks when reviewed.
    This reviewer received promo considerations or sweepstakes entry for writing a review.

    I recently purchased the iPad 11th Generation (A16 chip) from Best Buy, and I’m extremely happy with my experience and the product itself. The tablet runs very smoothly — apps open instantly, multitasking feels effortless, and the display is crisp and bright. Battery life easily lasts through a full day of work, studying, or streaming. The upgraded A16 chip and 128GB storage make a huge difference compared to older models. It’s perfect for my son’s online tutoring sessions and schoolwork — fast, reliable, and user-friendly. The USB-C port is also a nice touch, making it easier to connect accessories. Best Buy’s service was excellent - quick delivery, well-packaged, and friendly staff at pickup. Overall, a great purchase and highly recommended for students, families, or anyone who wants a high-performing iPad without spending too much.

    This review is from Apple - 11-inch iPad A16 chip with Wi-Fi - 128GB - Pink

    I would recommend this to a friend

    Rated 5 out of 5 stars

    Smooth, Easy, and Reliable. Best Buy Made My iPad

    |
    |
    Posted 4 months ago. Owned for 2 weeks when reviewed.
    This reviewer received promo considerations or sweepstakes entry for writing a review.

    I recently purchased an iPad from Best Buy and chose the in-store pickup option. From start to finish, the entire experience was smooth, quick, and absolutely stress-free. Placing the order online was easy, and I immediately received clear updates confirming that my iPad was ready for pickup. I really appreciate how organized and efficient the process was. When I arrived at the store, the staff greeted me with a smile and were ready to assist right away. The pickup counter was well-managed, and I didn’t have to wait long at all. Everything was already prepared and waiting for me, which made the process incredibly convenient. The employees were professional, polite, and made sure I had everything I needed before I left. The iPad itself was in flawless condition, exactly as described on the website. The packaging was perfect: sealed, clean, and handled with care. You could tell that Best Buy takes pride in the way they present and protect their products. Unboxing it felt exciting because it looked brand new and completely untouched. Once I got home and started using it, I was blown away by the quality. The display is crisp and vivid, the performance is lightning fast, and the overall build feels premium. Setting it up took just a few minutes, and everything worked perfectly right out of the box. I’ve already started using it for work, entertainment, and creative projects, and it has exceeded my expectations in every way. What truly stood out to me, though, was the customer service. The staff made the whole experience enjoyable, they were friendly, patient, and genuinely happy to help. It’s rare these days to see such consistent professionalism and kindness. Best Buy has always provided great service, but this pickup experience reminded me exactly why I continue to shop here. Everything about this purchase, from the easy online ordering to the fast pickup and perfect product quality, shows how much Best Buy values its customers. It’s one of the few places where I feel confident every time I shop because I know I’ll get exactly what I paid for, along with great service. Overall, I would rate this experience a solid 10 out of 10. The iPad is amazing, the staff was wonderful, and the entire process was effortless. Best Buy continues to earn my trust and loyalty, and I honestly wouldn’t buy my electronics anywhere else.

    This review is from Apple - 11-inch iPad A16 chip with Wi-Fi - 128GB - Blue

    I would recommend this to a friend

  • Pros mentioned:
    Screen Quality, Processor Speed, Battery Life

    Rated 5 out of 5 stars

    iPad (A16)

    |
    |
    Posted 10 months ago.
    This reviewer received promo considerations or sweepstakes entry for writing a review.

    The iPad powered by the A16 chip stands out as a highly reliable and well-rounded device, blending performance with everyday usability. Built on Apple’s advanced silicon architecture, the A16 chip delivers exceptional speed, power efficiency, and responsiveness. Whether you're multitasking between apps, editing high-resolution videos, or gaming, the iPad handles demanding tasks with ease and minimal lag. The integration of the A16 chip also enhances battery life, allowing users to stay productive or entertained for longer periods without constantly recharging. Beyond performance, the iPad with the A16 chip maintains Apple's reputation for premium build quality and long-term software support. With regular iPadOS updates, users benefit from the latest features and security enhancements for years, making the device a smart long-term investment. The A16’s advanced image processing and neural engine also enable improved photo and video capabilities, smoother FaceTime experiences, and efficient on-device machine learning tasks like handwriting recognition and voice dictation. While some may consider the iPad a premium purchase, its performance and longevity more than justify the price. Instead of replacing a cheaper tablet every couple of years due to lag or poor support, the A16 iPad offers consistent high-level performance and reliability over time. Its balance of power, design, and future-proofing makes it a worthwhile investment for students, professionals, and casual users alike.

    I would recommend this to a friend

    Just the Right Tablet for Most of Us

    |
    |
    Posted 5 months ago.
    This reviewer received promo considerations or sweepstakes entry for writing a review.

    The Apple 11‑inch iPad (A16) Wi‑Fi 128 GB delivers impressively smooth performance with its A16 chip—apps open instantly, multitasking is effortless, and streaming or editing feels totally reliable. With the 128 GB of storage, you’ve got plenty of space for apps, media, and files—no more endless “delete something” moments. It’s lightweight, comfortable to carry, and does a great job as a go-everywhere device. That said, if you’re after the absolute top display refresh rates or advanced pro features like AI support, it won’t hit those. In short: if you want a strong, dependable tablet for reading, browsing, light productivity, and fun—this one checks the boxes without getting overly complex.

  • Pros mentioned:
    Screen Quality, Overall Performance, Battery Life

    Rated 4 out of 5 stars

    Great iPad for kids

    |
    |
    Posted 2 months ago.
    This reviewer received promo considerations or sweepstakes entry for writing a review.

    I bought this iPad for my kids and overall it’s been a great purchase. They use it mostly for Roblox, YouTube, and a couple of educational apps, and it runs smoothly without lag or crashing. The screen looks really nice, the sound is good, and the battery lasts long enough for our daily routine. As a parent, I also love how easy it is to manage. I use Apple Screen Time and the parental controls to set limits, control what they can download, and keep the content age-appropriate, and it makes a big difference. My only real advice is: definitely buy a good, protective case (and even a screen protector). Kids drop things, and this will save you a headache. Other than that, I’m very happy with it and would recommend it to any parent looking for a reliable iPad for kids.

    I would recommend this to a friend

The performance is fast and smooth, whether I’m browsing, streaming, or using multiple apps at once. Apps open quickly, and everything just works without any lag. The screen is bright and clear, and the battery easily lasts all day. It’s also lightweight and easy to carry around, which makes it perfect for daily use.
